title: Salvador Dalí: In Search of Immortality
original_title: Salvador Dalí: In Search of Immortality
overview: The documentary proposes an exhaustive journey through the life and work of Salvador Dalí, and also of Gala, his muse and collaborator. It starts in 1929, a crucial year in Dalí's career and life, as he joined the surrealist group and met Gala, and advances until the year of the artist's death in 1989.
